title: `alam #5956
definition:
1) to conceal, hide, be hidden, be concealed, be secret
    1a) (Qal) secret (participle)
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be concealed
        1b2) concealed, dissembler (participle)
    1c) (Hiphil) to conceal, hide
    1d) (Hithpael) to hide oneself
nasbUsage:
